description_long: This is a sleek, high-performance Lamborghini sports car with an aggressive aerodynamic design and a low, wide stance. The body features sharp, angular lines, prominent air intakes, and a distinctive rear engine cover with multiple vents. The car is equipped with a large rear spoiler, low-profile tires on five-spoke alloy wheels, and a pronounced front splitter. The windows are tinted and seamlessly integrated into the sculpted bodywork, while the side mirrors are streamlined for minimal drag. The exterior is finished in a glossy white with red accents along the lower body and around the wheels, emphasizing its sporty character.
description: A glossy white Lamborghini sports car with sharp lines, red accents, a large rear spoiler, and five-spoke alloy wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular hood, wide front splitter, and sharply contoured headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low profile, large wheels, red side skirts, and aerodynamic side intakes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the prominent rear spoiler, engine cover vents, and aggressive rear diffuser.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the sculpted doors, red accents, and detailed wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke alloy wheels with split-spoke design and black accents
